q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Parser is configured with no_network=False, load_dtd=True, and resolve_entities=True, enabling network I/O and file reads during XML parsing.

mock_guidance.target: Mock etree.fromstring or the XMLParser to intercept the XML parsing call on line 188.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the request.body argument passed to etree.fromstring to verify it contains malicious XML entities or DTDs.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a dummy etree.Element with a predictable tag (e.g., 'root') so that the subsequent doc.tag access in the return statement succeeds without triggering actual entity resolution or network access.
notes: Mocking at the parser level (etree.XMLParser) is an alternative if you need to specifically assert that resolve_entities=True was used.
Ensure the mock prevents any outbound network connections or local file reads that a real XXE payload would attempt.
